sqlMap.select: SELECT openflag FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE docid = #docId#
SELECT href FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = #docId# AND openflag <> '3';

SELECT attachfilehref FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn WHERE TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = #docId# AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = #sn# AND fileopenflag = 'Y'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_GOVDOCSEND (docid, attachsn, type, senddate, tenant_id, companyid) VALUES (#docId#, #attachSn#, #type#, now(), '0', #companyNum#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY) = 0 THEN '1' ELSE (SELECT MAX(sn) FROM TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY) + 1 END AS sn
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY (sn, senddate, sendflag) VALUES (#sn#, now(), 'Y')
sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid, '' AS 'n2', '' AS 'n3', '' AS 'n4', '' AS 'n5', '' AS 'n6', '' AS 'n7', TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle, '' AS 'n9', DATE_FORMAT(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.createdate, "%Y%m%d%H%i%s") AS createdate, #companyNum# AS companycode, #companyName# AS companyname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptid, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writername, '' AS 'n16', TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docno, TBL_CABINETCLASS.keepingperiod, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.publicitycode, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.basis, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.reason, '' AS 'n22', '' AS 'n23', '' AS 'n24', '' AS 'n25', TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.listopenflag, '' AS 'n27', '' AS 'n28', TBL_RECORD.aprmembertitle, (SELECT aprmemberjobtitle FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE docid = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid AND aprtype IN ('001' OR '016' OR '004') ORDER BY aprmembersn DESC LIMIT 1) AS aprmemberjobtitle, IFNULL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.openlimitdate, CURDATE()-1) AS openlimitdate, '' AS 'n32', '' AS 'n33', '01' AS 'n34', (SELECT CONCAT( '본문:', TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid, ':', TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle, SUBSTR(NVL(FORMFILELOCATION, HREF), -4), ':', IFNULL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docsize, '60112'), ':0:', CASE WHEN openflag = '3' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END, CASE WHEN attach IS NULL THEN '' ELSE attach END) ) AS filelist FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_RECORD.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_RECORD.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_RECORD.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.cabinetid = TBL_CABINET.cabinetid AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_CABINET.tenant_id AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_CABINET.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS ON TBL_CABINET.cabinetclassno = TBL_CABINETCLASS.cabinetclassno AND TBL_CABINET.tenant_id = TBL_CABINETCLASS.tenant_id AND TBL_CABINET.companyid = TBL_CABINETCLASS.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.OPENGOVFLAG = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT docid, GROUP_CONCAT(attach SEPARATOR '') AS attach FROM (SELECT TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid, CONCAT( ':첨부:', TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid, sn, ':', attachfilename, ':', IFNULL(attachfilesize, '1024'), ':', sn-1, ':', fileopenflag) AS attach FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.companyid ) ATTACHLIST GROUP BY docid ) FILEATTACHLIST ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = FILEATTACHLIST.docid WHERE (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '011' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate IS NULL) AND DATE(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.createdate) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT DATE(senddate) FROM TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY WHERE sendflag = 'N'

SELECT TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid, '' AS 'n2', '' AS 'n3', '' AS 'n4', '' AS 'n5', '' AS 'n6', '' AS 'n7', TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle, '' AS 'n9', DATE_FORMAT(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.createdate, "%Y%m%d%H%i%s") AS createdate, #companyNum# AS companycode, #companyName# AS companyname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptid, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerdeptname, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writername, '' AS 'n16', TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docno, TBL_CABINETCLASS.keepingperiod, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.publicitycode, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.basis, TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.reason, '' AS 'n22', '' AS 'n23', '' AS 'n24', '' AS 'n25', TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.listopenflag, '' AS 'n27', '' AS 'n28', TBL_RECORD.aprmembertitle, (SELECT aprmemberjobtitle FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE docid = TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid AND aprtype IN ('001' OR '016' OR '004') ORDER BY aprmembersn DESC LIMIT 1) AS aprmemberjobtitle, IFNULL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.openlimitdate, CURDATE()-1) AS openlimitdate, '' AS 'n32', '' AS 'n33', '01' AS 'n34', (SELECT CONCAT( '본문:', TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid, ':', TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.doctitle, '.mht:', IFNULL(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docsize, '60112'), ':0:', CASE WHEN openflag = '3' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END, CASE WHEN attach IS NULL THEN '' ELSE attach END) ) AS filelist FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_RECORD ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_RECORD.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_RECORD.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_RECORD.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.cabinetid = TBL_CABINET.cabinetid AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_CABINET.tenant_id AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_CABINET.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_CABINETCLASS ON TBL_CABINET.cabinetclassno = TBL_CABINETCLASS.cabinetclassno AND TBL_CABINET.tenant_id = TBL_CABINETCLASS.tenant_id AND TBL_CABINET.companyid = TBL_CABINETCLASS.companyid INNER JOIN TBL_FORMINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_FORMINFO.COMPANYID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_FORMINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID = TBL_FORMINFO.FORMID AND TBL_FORMINFO.OPENGOVFLAG = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT docid, GROUP_CONCAT(attach SEPARATOR '') AS attach FROM (SELECT TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid, CONCAT( ':첨부:', TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid, sn, ':', attachfilename, ':', IFNULL(attachfilesize, '1024'), ':', sn-1, ':', fileopenflag) AS attach FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.tenant_id = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.companyid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.companyid ) ATTACHLIST GROUP BY docid ) FILEATTACHLIST ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = FILEATTACHLIST.docid WHERE (TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '011' OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate IS NULL) AND DATE(TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.CREATEDATE) IN
DATE_FORMAT(#resendDate[]#, '%Y-%m-%d')
